# IJ Creditor (Iuris Justitia Creditor)

> Independent Madrid law firm specialised in commercial debt collection in Spain
> for creditors based outside Spain. Out-of-court and judicial recovery,
> supervised by lawyers, operating since 1992. Service in English, German,
> French, Italian and Portuguese; action before Spanish debtors in Spanish.

## What we do
- Out-of-court debt collection in Spain (success-fee, lawyer-supervised file by file)
- Judicial debt collection in Spain (court action preceded by a feasibility report)
- International debt collection (for foreign clients with debtors outside Spain)
- Credit & solvency reports on Spanish debtors

## Who we serve
Foreign companies and creditors with unpaid invoices owed by debtors in Spain.
Sectors: transport & logistics, manufacturing & industrial supply, chemicals/pharma/medical
devices, construction & public suppliers, textile, travel & car rental, equipment rental & leasing.

## Key facts
- Firm: Iuris Justitia Creditor S.L. — NIF B80508716
- Founded: 1992 | Location: Paseo de la Castellana 120, 28046 Madrid, Spain
- Phone: +34 915 77 47 30 | Email: ijcreditor@ijcreditor.es
- ~3,000 companies served; over 80% of cases resolved out of court
- Member of ECA (European Collectors Association), LIC International, American Lawyers Quarterly
